title: Jasper's Survival Tweaks
description: Here's all the mods/resource packs I use for survival/can't live without!:) These include some QoL mods I’ve collected and other tweaks, including a Vanilla Tweaks pack, what’s made 100% by me:) So enjoy!:)
body:
### I DON'T KNOW WHEN I'M GOING TO UPDATE THIS SO IT'LL MAYBE HAVE OUTDATED MODS!!!!!!
### 
Welcome to my survival pack!

A guide to installing the modpack will be in the GitHub page of this modpack: https://github.com/JasperSoosaar25/Jasper-s-Survival-Tweaks, make sure to read the README file at the GitHub page to know how to obtain the guide at the „main” branch:) ![The README file at the GitHub page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e51f306fcbc6074d55688d89e0a70caacd065140_0.webp)
This modpack adds a carefully selected set of quality-of-life mods and resource packs designed to enhance your vanilla Minecraft survival experience without changing the core gameplay :)

What does it add?

Mods that improve gameplay comfort, such as inventory management, better tooltips, and improved crafting.
Tweaks that balance and polish vanilla mechanics for smoother and more enjoyable survival.

A custom Vanilla Tweaks–style resource pack made 100% by me, improving visuals while keeping the original Minecraft feel. I got the pack from https://vanillatweaks.net.

Why download this modpack?

It makes survival less tedious and more fun, with useful features that save time and reduce frustration.
The resource pack enhances aesthetics without straying from the classic Minecraft look.

Perfect for players who want a “vanilla+” experience — familiar Minecraft with smart improvements :)

A full list of included mods is when you click at the version and then scroll down to dependencies. Dive in and enjoy! 

If you enjoy the pack and want to support my work, you can do so here (thank you!): [Support me on Ko-fi:)](https://ko-fi.com/jaspersoosaar25)
